title: Implement persistent message acknowledgments in NanoQueue core
description: Messages currently lost if worker crashes mid-processing. Need WAL-based acknowledgment so messages re-queue on worker failure. Spec in notion linked.

title: Add configurable retry policy with exponential backoff
description: Consumers need to define retry policies (max_attempts, backoff_multiplier, jitter) per queue. DLQ should receive messages exceeding max_attempts.

title: Dead-letter queue API endpoint and consumer binding
description: Expose /queues/{name}/dlq endpoint. DLQ consumer must be bindable independently from main queue. Ref BKD-102.

title: Race condition in worker-dispatcher under high concurrency (>500 msg/s)
description: Load test reveals duplicate deliveries at >500 msg/s. Mutex in dispatch loop is released before offset commit finishes. Reproduces consistently in staging.

title: api-gateway health check returns 200 even when Redis is unreachable
description: GET /health returns 200 OK with degraded Redis status but no 503. Clients cannot distinguish partial outage. Should return 503 when any critical dependency is unhealthy.

title: Add Prometheus metrics endpoint to event-router
description: Event-router lacks /metrics endpoint. Need routed_events_total, routing_errors_total, and queue_depth counters for the monitoring dashboard.

title: Migrate auth-service token store from in-memory to Redis
description: Token store is currently in-memory, causing lost sessions on pod restart. Migrate to Redis with configurable TTL. Part of AUTH-V2 project.

title: OIDC discovery endpoint /.well-known/openid-configuration
description: Auth-service needs to expose the standard OIDC discovery document so third-party IdPs can auto-configure. Part of AUTH-V2.

title: LogStream: structured JSON log parsing breaks on nested arrays
description: LogStream ingestor fails silently when log line contains nested JSON arrays (e.g. tags field). Root cause: schema inference bails on array-of-objects.

title: Add configurable log sampling rate to LogStream sidecar
description: High-traffic pods flood the data pipeline. Need per-pod sampling_rate config (0.0-1.0) in the LogStream sidecar annotations to reduce volume.

title: LogStream 1.0 release checklist and changelog
description: Consolidate GA release checklist: docs, changelog, GitHub release tag, Docker Hub push, homebrew formula update.

title: ArgoCD ApplicationSets for multi-env deployments
description: Replace per-environment Argo Application manifests with ApplicationSet generator so staging, production, and sandbox are managed from single template.

title: node-worker-6 NotReady - taint and investigate disk pressure
description: node-worker-6 went NotReady 2026-03-20. kubelet logs show disk pressure on /var/lib/containerd. Drain and remediate or replace node.

title: Kubernetes 1.30 upgrade pre-flight compatibility check
description: Run pluto, kube-no-trouble, and API deprecation scanner against all workloads before scheduling the 1.30 upgrade window.

title: Write integration tests for retry policy exhaustion and DLQ binding
description: No integration tests covering the full retry-to-DLQ path. Needed before BKD-102/103 can merge. Use testcontainers with in-memory Redis.

title: API docs: update OpenAPI spec for v3 queue endpoints
description: OpenAPI spec still documents v2 queue endpoints. Update to include persistent-ack, retry-policy, and DLQ endpoints. Autogenerate from annotations.

title: Loki log retention policy - prune logs older than 90 days
description: Loki volume growing unbounded. Set retention to 90 days for production logs and 30 days for staging. Configure compactor and chunk store accordingly.

title: Integrate external-secrets-operator with AWS Secrets Manager
description: Replace manual Secret manifests with ExternalSecret resources backed by AWS Secrets Manager. Covers DB creds, API keys, and OAuth client secrets.

title: Benchmark NanoQueue v3 throughput against Kafka and RabbitMQ
description: Pre-GA benchmark comparing v3 persistent-ack implementation against Kafka 3.7 and RabbitMQ 3.13 at 1k/5k/10k msg/s. Publish results to README.

title: Velero backup schedule - verify restore on staging weekly
description: Velero backups are scheduled but restores are never tested. Add weekly automated restore drill to staging and alert on failure.

title: event-router staging CrashLoopBackOff after rc1 deploy
description: event-router 3.3.0-rc1 crashes on startup in staging with nil pointer in routing rule loader. Config map migration between 3.2 and 3.3 schema is broken.
